title: dracontomelon cumingianum
intro: Dracontomelon cumingianum, also known as the wild mangosteen, is a tropical plant native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dracontomelon cumingianum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating various skin conditions. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
